addresses.title: Premium Wallets

activity.empty: No auto-revoke activity yet. Approvals matching your rules will appear here as they are revoked.
activity.empty_preview: Auto-revoke activity will appear here once you upgrade to Ultimate and set up Auto-Revoking.

reasons.awaiting_cheap_gas: Waiting for lower gas prices to stretch your monthly budget.
reasons.chain_pipeline_full: Waiting for other revokes on this chain to confirm.
reasons.cooling: Waiting out a short safety delay before executing, so rule changes can still cancel it.
reasons.execution_failed: The revoke transaction could not be completed.
reasons.monthly_budget: Waiting because the monthly budget is used up. Exploit-triggered revokes still go through.
reasons.monthly_budget_urgent: Waiting because this month's maximum spend for exploit-triggered revokes has been reached.
reasons.per_action_cap: Waiting because the estimated cost exceeds the per-revoke limit.
reasons.subscription_inactive: Waiting for an active subscription to cover this wallet.
reasons.transient_error: A temporary error occurred; this will be retried.

activity.title: Activity

budget.exploit_protection: Exploit-triggered revokes still go through when the budget is used up.
budget.shared: The gas budget is shared by all wallets in the subscription.

auto_revoke.load_failed: Failed to load your Auto-Revoking configuration. Please refresh the page or try again later.
auto_revoke.metamask_required: Auto-Revoking requires MetaMask. Please connect with MetaMask to use this feature.

permissions.connect_to_manage: Connect this wallet to manage its permissions.
permissions.grant_description: Each address must individually grant auto-revoke permission via MetaMask.
permissions.revoke_transaction_reverted: The transaction to disable the permission failed onchain. Sync from wallet and try again.
permissions.sync_failed: Failed to sync auto-revoke permissions from wallet.
permissions.title: Permissions

rules.defaults_description: These rules apply to all wallets in this subscription by default, but each wallet can override them.
rules.risk_detection_description: Auto-revoke approvals to risky or exploited spenders.
rules.stale_approval_description: Revoke approvals older than the specified number of days.
rules.title: Rules

setup.banner: Auto-Revoking is not active for this wallet yet.
setup.get_started: Auto-Revoking is not active for this wallet yet. Toggle the networks you want protected below. Every wallet in the subscription needs to do this once, using MetaMask.

auto_revoke.title: Auto-Revoking
auto_revoke.upsell: Auto-Revoking automatically revokes dangerous or stale approvals on your behalf. It requires an Ultimate subscription.

details.refund_available: You can still cancel this payment and receive a full refund.

extension.lite_description: Coverage is inactive because the extension is on the Lite tier. Switch to Standard to activate up to $30k in theft coverage.
extension.not_installed_description: You are currently not covered by the Revoke Sidekick extension. Install the Revoke Sidekick extension for real-time transaction warnings and up to $30k in theft coverage.
extension.standard_description: You are covered for up to $30k in theft protection through the Revoke Sidekick extension.
extension.title: Revoke Sidekick Coverage

fairside.active_description: You are covered for up to {amount} in theft protection through Fairside.
fairside.description: Protect your wallet against phishing and social engineering drains with Fairside coverage.

errors.connect_wallet: Please connect your wallet to authenticate

fairside.title: Fairside Coverage
fairside.wallets_description: Sign an authentication message to view your covered wallets.

description: Manage your premium subscription and account settings.
error: Something went wrong loading your subscription data. Please try again later.

meta.description: Manage your account and premium settings.
meta.title: Account Settings

cancellation.cancelled_on: Cancelled on {date}. Your payment was refunded.
cancellation.modal_access_notice: You keep access to your subscription until the refund is processed. The refund is sent to the wallet that paid.
cancellation.modal_description: This cancels your {planName} payment and refunds it in full. If you have other payments, your subscription is recalculated without this one.
cancellation.reason_placeholder: Let us know why you're cancelling
cancellation.success: Refund requested. You keep access until the refund is processed.

subscription.downgrade_not_supported: You cannot downgrade an active subscription.
subscription.expired_preserved: Your wallet slots and Auto-Revoking rules are preserved. Renew to pick up where you left off.
subscription.expired_ultimate_stopped: Auto-Revoking is no longer monitoring your wallets.
subscription.expires_in: Expires in {days, plural, =1 {1 day} other {# days}} ({date})
subscription.legal_notice: By subscribing, you agree to our <terms-link>Terms of Service</terms-link>.
subscription.no_subscription: You don't have an active premium subscription. Subscribe to get started. <premium-link>Learn more about Premium</premium-link>.
subscription.optional_own_subscription: You already have access through a granted subscription. You can still subscribe for your own plan if you'd like.
subscription.payment_confirmed: Payment confirmed! Your premium subscription is now active.
subscription.payment_expired: The payment window expired. If you already sent the full USDC amount, it will be credited automatically once it lands on-chain. Check your subscription status in a few minutes.
subscription.payment_summary: You will pay {amount} {token} for {days} days. Includes up to {maxAddresses} {maxAddresses, plural, =1 {wallet} other {wallets}}.
subscription.plans_unavailable: Checkout is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
subscription.title: Premium Subscription
subscription.ultimate_requires_metamask: Auto-Revoking requires MetaMask. You can pay with any wallet, and set up Auto-Revoking afterwards by connecting with MetaMask.
subscription.wrong_wallet_error: The payment must be sent from {address}. Please switch to that wallet and try again.

unauthenticated.description: Sign in to manage your Premium subscription, Auto-Revoking, wallet slots, and coverage.

selected_plan.summary: {price} per year with up to {maxAddresses} wallets included. Connect your wallet to continue.
